item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
jq -e '(.owner | type) == \"string\" and .owner == \"release\"' longhorizon-work/rehearsal-A/catalog.json
if rg -n -i -F 'ops' longhorizon-work/rehearsal-A/catalog.json longhorizon-work/rehearsal-A/docs/handoff.md; then exit 1; else echo 'abandoned_owner_matches=0'; fi"
